name: homerail
description: Voice-first local agent orchestration runtime for auditable DAG workflows.

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix homerail_protocol ci && npm --prefix homerail_plugin_sdk ci && npm --prefix homerail_manager ci && npm --prefix homerail_node ci && npm --prefix homerail_worker ci && npm --prefix homerail_cli ci && npm --prefix agent-ui ci
scripts.build:packages: npm --prefix homerail_protocol run build && npm --prefix homerail_plugin_sdk run build && npm --prefix homerail_manager run build && npm --prefix homerail_node run build && npm --prefix homerail_worker run build && npm --prefix homerail_cli run build && npm --prefix agent-ui run build
scripts.test:packages: npm --prefix homerail_protocol test && npm --prefix homerail_plugin_sdk test && npm --prefix homerail_manager test && npm --prefix homerail_node test && npm --prefix homerail_worker test && npm --prefix homerail_cli test && npm --prefix agent-ui test && npm run test:live-validator
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix homerail_protocol run typecheck && npm --prefix homerail_plugin_sdk run typecheck && npm --prefix homerail_manager run typecheck && npm --prefix homerail_node run typecheck && npm --prefix homerail_worker run typecheck && npm --prefix homerail_cli run typecheck && npm --prefix agent-ui run typecheck
scripts.audit: npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_protocol audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_plugin_sdk audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_manager audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_node audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_worker audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix homerail_cli audit --audit-level=high && npm --registry=https://registry.npmjs.org --prefix agent-ui audit --audit-level=high
scripts.ci: npm run typecheck && npm run build:packages && npm run test:packages
